notes: The file constructs the translation-by-base-field-point algebra endomorphism τ_k : K(E) →ₐ[F] K(E) via the addX/addY group-law formula, directly paralleling addPullbackAlgHom in AdditionPullback.lean. The long injectivity proof (76 lines) is an explicit transposition of addCoordAlgHom_injective_of_baseHom_inj and relies on the CoordinateRing basis decomposition and degree_norm_smul_basis. Three declarations (translateX_xy_ne_const_of_pole, translateBaseHom_injective_of_transcendental, ord_translateSlope_xy) are unused within the file but are consumed by TranslationOrd.lean and TranslateValuation.lean; x_gen_sub_const_ne_zero is the most widely referenced export across the project.
